title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: AAW/PC control by dispatching CEntry and CCall functions
bounty_rationale: v8 sandbox bypass without demonstrating a controlled write
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Summary

Builtins such as `CEntry_Return1_ArgvOnStack_NoBuiltinExit` and `MemCopyUint8Uint8` are installable on JS dispatch entries and dispatchable when they likely should not be. As, these can be used to perform attacker controlled control-flow hijacks and/or arbitr
